name: design-pack
description: Three design-craft skills for daily-driver Claude models: ui-design-craft (static visual judgment - layout, typography, color, AI-slop bans, state coverage, a mechanical pre-flight gate), motion-craft (implementation-agnostic motion budgets and easing doctrine), design-review-gate (turning design review into observable checks, plus the design-contract evidence rules). Domain doctrine in the opus-pack style: numeric budgets, prohibited patterns, executable gates over long prose. Registers no hooks.
